title: SCP-500, Panacea
description: An anomalous pill that can cure any effect...
body:
Panacea adds a new item. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-500, also known as Panacea.


SCP-500 is a small plastic can which contains five red pills. One pill, when consumed, effectively cures the subject of all effects and heals the subject. However those pills cannot be reconstructed, so you only have a few of them left, making your decission on taking them or not even harder.

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Where does SCP-500 spawn?

SCP-500 spawns in a containment chamber, usually underground in the overworld. There may be multiple SCP-500s.

</details>



![SCP-500](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ea039c9fa6165edf2e28dfb6129551e1f54cff4.png)

SCP-500 is a plastic can that contains about 5 pills. You can fill up the can with pills but it cannot contain more than 5 pills. SCP-500 can be found underground in a containment chamber and because it is Minecraft there will definitely be several of these containment chambers in your world. If you right click on SCP-500 you will get a red pill which, when consumed, will remove all effects and heal the player. The pill can also be givento other entities and can even heal Zombie Villagers, Zoglins, Zombie Horses, Skeleton Horses and Zombified Piglins. However, these pills are rare and difficult to find, so it is advisable to only use them in emergencies. However, if you right-click the Plastic Can while sneaking, you can even take it with you and place it again.

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
